title: Canonical Object Contract: behavior, completeness, cross-linking, and flow expectations enforced across all WAI objects
summary: Single source of truth for what makes a WAI object canonical. A validator (tools/validate_canonical.py) reads this contract and enforces it; harness gates (lug creation, autopilot grooming, closeout) call the validator so the expectations are maintained as the harness evolves rather than re-derived per session. Four dimensions: BEHAVIOR (declares enough to act on without conversation context), COMPLETENESS (required fields present and non-empty), CROSS-LINKING (references resolve to real objects), FLOW (lifecycle and location integrity).

dimensions.behavior: An object must declare enough that ANY agent can act on it without the authoring conversation. Lugs carry PEV + routing + model_fit; specs carry subject_id + lifecycle state; teachings carry safe_to_auto_adopt + a verify block; track turns carry thinking + decisions.
dimensions.completeness: All required fields present and non-empty. No placeholders. Referenced files must exist.
dimensions.cross_linking: Every reference resolves to a real object: dependencies / blocked_by / blocking -> existing lug ids; spec_id -> an active spec; teaching extends/source_lugs -> resolvable; memory [[links]] -> existing slugs (unresolved links are allowed only as explicit forward-references). Track entries carry origin_session_id + contributor so multi-session/forked track files retain exact provenance.
dimensions.flow: Lifecycle and location agree: a lug's folder matches its status; specs use draft/active/deprecated (never open/completed); completed lugs record outcome_verification; incoming/ and seed/ingest/ are transient, not graveyards.

completeness_rules.note: perceive AND execute AND (verify OR acceptance_criteria) must all be present and non-empty

flow_rules.note: a lug under bytype/{type}/open/ must have status open|o; in_progress/ -> in-progress|p; completed/ -> closed|resolved|c
spec lugs live under bytype/spec/{draft,active,deprecated}/ matching status
active specs must appear in WAI-SpecIndex.jsonl
a teaching copied to seed/ingest/processed/ must not also be listed as pending/new

completeness_rules.note: per-entry attribution enables safe multi-session / forked track files; kind in {user, agent}

cross_link_rules.note: unresolved links allowed as explicit forward-references

enforcement.validator: tools/validate_canonical.py (reads this spec; --json for machine output; exit 1 on error-severity violations)
gates: lug creation — validate before writing a new lug to open/
autopilot grooming — Phase 0.5 _score_lug should defer ineligible (already partial; extend with cross-link + flow checks)
closeout — validate the spoke's object set; surface violations in the closeout report
harness evolution — any change to object schemas updates THIS spec first; the spec is the contract, code conforms to it
